description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright machine with a predominantly black and yellow color scheme. The side panels feature vibrant artwork depicting the Q*bert character, a purple snake, and a speech bubble with comic symbols, all set atop a geometric, isometric block pattern. The front of the cabinet displays a large screen with the Q*bert game interface, surrounded by colorful graphics and the 'Q*bert' logo on the marquee. The control panel is angled and includes a joystick and several buttons, with a detailed, colorful overlay matching the game's theme. Below the control panel, there is a coin slot and a speaker grille. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF, with a hard, smooth finish and visible bezels around the screen and marquee.
description: A classic upright Q*bert arcade game cabinet with bold side artwork, a colorful control panel, and a prominent front screen and marquee. The cabinet is mainly black and yellow, featuring detailed graphics and a coin slot.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the yellow panel with Q*bert, a purple snake, and geometric block artwork, as well as the protruding control panel.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible artwork or features.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with identical Q*bert-themed graphics and the control panel visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the screen with the Q*bert game, the colorful marquee, control panel with joystick and buttons, and the coin slot below.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a cluster, set on a slanted panel with a vibrant, game-themed overlay.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Q*bert' logo in large, colorful letters with game characters and geometric patterns, matching the playful and retro theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, colorful artwork of Q*bert, a purple snake, and isometric cubes, with a comic-style speech bubble, all set against a yellow background.
